metadata.description: 标准配置模板 - 从当前Rmd原型提取

borrowing.a0_description: External control discount factor. Range: [0, 1]. 0 means no borrowing, 1 means full borrowing.

weighting.trim_description: Quantile-based IPTW trimming to reduce extreme weights

survival.cut_points_description: Time interval cut points for survival analysis (in months)

mcmc_advanced.adapt_delta_description: Target average proposal acceptance probability (brms default: 0.8)
mcmc_advanced.max_treedepth_description: Maximum tree depth for No-U-Turn sampler (brms default: 10)
mcmc_advanced.note: Uncomment and set values if custom tuning is needed

output.save_warmup_description: Whether to save warmup samples in output
output.run_id_description: Prefix for unique run identifier (e.g., demo_001, demo_002)

preprocessing.ps_formula: trt ~ age + sex + ecog + stage + biomarker + prior_tx + albumin
preprocessing.note: Preprocessing parameters are currently shared from this config for reference. Actual preprocessing is handled upstream before Bayesian engine input.

notes.usage: This config file drives the Bayesian borrowing analysis. All parameters are extracted from the original Rmd prototype (场景二-贝叶斯借用.Rmd) and frozen here for reproducibility and future Stan migration.
notes.versioning: Any changes to borrowing parameters, MCMC settings, or weighting rules must update the version number (e.g., 0.1 → 0.2).
notes.future_work: In Step 2 (Stan migration) and beyond, this config will be the single source of truth for both R-based and Stan-based implementations.
